---
name: Answer to an open question
about: Propose an answer to a question from docs/open-questions.md
title: "[open-question Q?] "
labels: open-question
assignees: ''
---

## Which question

Question number and title from `docs/open-questions.md` (e.g., "Q4. `in`
operator and collection membership").

## Your proposed answer

The direction you think the project should take, with enough detail that
another contributor could start implementing it.

## Why this over alternatives

Briefly, what other answers did you consider, and why did you pick this
one?

## What this doesn't solve

Honest statement of the parts of the question your proposal leaves open.
